calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: Caritas management Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Fred Doughty, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Curtis Melvin.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement dtd 06-01-05-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Notice to Quit dtd 01-11-07------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 3434 18th Street, #3, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $313.60
Costs $280.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.
